title: TTRP Plushies [NO UPDATES]
description: Resource-pack that let's players have plushies :]
body:
## | Not Affiliated With TTRP Anymore, There Will Be No Updates | ![Description](https://i.imgur.com/aw0U3vh.png) A Funny Resource Pack That Lets Players Have Little Plushies In-game.\ I Will Try Updating This Once A Week With New Plushies :] Just Download It, Load It, And Have Fun! ## • CIT REQUIRED Click On The Image To Go To The Mod Page! ![FAQ](https://i.imgur.com/OGkzWhm.png) ## • How To Use It? > Click **Download**, Select the version of minecraft you use, Then you need to open your **Minecraft Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder.** And then you throw the entire **ZIP file** into the folder and you toggle the resourcepack on. ## • Does The Resource pack Update Itself? > No, the resource pack doesn't update itself you will need to redownload it through the page. ## • How Do I Make/Get A Plushie? > You need to grab a piece of **White Wool** and rename it to any of the plushie names from the list provided below using the command **/item name (Character Name) Plushie**.\ > For Example: ```/item name F2 Plushie``` ## [--------------------------] My Discord Server [--------------------------] > So you can get notified when it updates, And share fun with other plushie lovers. ![Plushie_List](https://i.imgur.com/abMNbvO.png) ## There Is 563 Plushies In The Resourcepack.
